articles.description: Researchers have developed fully lignin-based epoxy resin systems for metal coating applications that deliver reliable adhesion, impact resistance and durability – positioning depolymerised lignin as a scalable, bio-based alternative to bisphenol-derived resins.

articles.title: Polydopamine-graphene boosts anticorrosion performance of waterborne zinc-rich epoxy coatings
articles.description: A new polydopamine-modified graphene (PDA-G) filler significantly enhances the adhesion, dispersibility, and corrosion resistance of waterborne zinc-rich epoxy coatings (WZEP). articles.title: Chitosan microspheres enable smart corrosion warning coatings
articles.description: Researchers have developed a smart corrosion-warning coating based on chitosan microspheres encapsulating phenolphthalein.
